title: Valid login with correct credentials
steps: Send POST request to /login with username in query parameter
Include valid username and password in request body
Verify response status code is 200
Verify login successful message

title: Missing username in query parameter
steps: Send POST request to /login without username query parameter
Include username and password in request body
Verify response status code is 401
Verify unauthorized error message

title: Missing password in request body
steps: Send POST request to /login with username in query parameter
Include only username in request body without password
Verify response status code is 401
Verify unauthorized error message

title: Wrong credentials provided
steps: Send POST request to /login with username in query parameter
Include incorrect username or password in request body
Verify response status code is 401
Verify unauthorized error message

title: Username with single character
steps: Send POST request to /login with single character username in query
Include single character username and valid password in body
Verify response status code is 200 or 401 based on system rules
Verify appropriate response

title: Empty username in query parameter
steps: Send POST request to /login with empty username in query
Include valid credentials in request body
Verify response status code is 401
Verify unauthorized error message

title: SQL injection attempt in username
steps: Send POST request to /login with SQL injection string in query username
Include malicious payload in request body username
Verify response status code is 401
Verify unauthorized error message

title: Username with special characters
steps: Send POST request to /login with special characters in username query
Include special characters in request body username
Verify response status code is 200 or 401 based on system rules
Verify appropriate response

title: Very long username string
steps: Send POST request to /login with maximum length username in query
Include very long username in request body
Verify response status code is 200 or 401 based on system rules
Verify appropriate response

title: XSS attempt in username
steps: Send POST request to /login with XSS script in query username
Include XSS payload in request body username
Verify response status code is 401
Verify unauthorized error message
